---
title: "Teaching"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell">
  <section class="section-block">
    <h2 class="section-title">Teaching Assistantships</h2>
    <div class="card-grid two-up">
      <article class="entry-card">
        <h3>POLI 311 Introduction to Quantitative Methods</h3>
        <div class="meta-row">
          <p class="meta-text"><em>Prof. Aaron Erlich, Jan-Apr 2024</em></p>
          <span class="pill alt">Evaluation 4.5/5</span>
          <details class="inline-toggle">
            <summary>Details</summary>
            <div class="toggle-panel">
              <p>Organized instruction material and facilitated weekly labs for R programming and quantitative political methodology for 50 students and managed assignment grading.</p>
            </div>
          </details>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="entry-card">
        <h3>POLI 210 Political Science Research Methods</h3>
        <div class="meta-row">
          <p class="meta-text"><em>Profs. Dietlind Stolle and Aaron Erlich, Sep-Dec 2023</em></p>
          <span class="pill alt">Evaluation 4.4/5</span>
          <details class="inline-toggle">
            <summary>Details</summary>
            <div class="toggle-panel">
              <p>Organized instruction material and facilitated weekly labs for 90 students for R programming and evaluated quantitative and qualitative assignments.</p>
            </div>
          </details>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="entry-card">
        <h3>POLI 435 Identity and Inequality</h3>
        <div class="meta-row">
          <p class="meta-text"><em>Prof. Narendra Subramanian, Jan-Apr 2023</em></p>
          <span class="pill alt">Evaluation 4.7/5</span>
          <details class="inline-toggle">
            <summary>Details</summary>
            <div class="toggle-panel">
              <p>Facilitated weekly conference sections for 40 students, graded assignments and term papers.</p>
            </div>
          </details>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="entry-card">
        <h3>POLI 349 Foreign Policy of Asia</h3>
        <div class="meta-row">
          <p class="meta-text"><em>Dr. Jaeyoung Kim, Sep-Dec 2022</em></p>
          <span class="pill alt">Evaluation 4.6/5</span>
          <details class="inline-toggle">
            <summary>Details</summary>
            <div class="toggle-panel">
              <p>Facilitated weekly conference sections for over 70 students and managed assignment evaluations.</p>
            </div>
          </details>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section-block">
    <h2 class="section-title">Workshop Instruction</h2>
    <div class="feature-layout">
      <figure class="feature-figure">
        <img src="csdc%20teaching.jpg" alt="Teaching at the CSDC Winter Methods School.">
        <figcaption>Methods instruction on survey design and conjoint analysis</figcaption>
      </figure>
      <div class="card-stack">
        <article class="entry-card">
          <h3>Conjoint Analysis: Visual and Interview Approach</h3>
          <div class="meta-row">
            <p class="meta-text"><em>CSDC Winter Methods School, Universite de Montreal, Jan 2024</em></p>
            <a class="link-pill" href="CSDC_Winter_Methods_Conjoint_Analysis_Pratik%20Mahajan.pdf">Slides</a>
            <details class="inline-toggle">
              <summary>Details</summary>
              <div class="toggle-panel">
                <p>Introduction and a critical discussion of using graphics to conduct conjoint analyses and incorporating interviews as a robustness check while administering conjoint surveys in developing contexts where literacy levels and digital infrastructure are poor and outsider skepticism is high.</p>
              </div>
            </details>
          </div>
        </article>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
